assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identifies U1 (7812, L7812 LDO) converting +24V to +12V, and U2 (HT7550-1, matched to MCP1700x lib) converting +12V to +5V. Both appear in power_regulators with correct topology='LDO', input_rail, and output_rail fields. The SMF33A TVS on U4 (D3) is also correctly classified as a reverse_polarity protection device on the +24V rail.
